source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/08 Foliage Tools

evidences.content: 这就是我们的树叶模式。 So here is our foliage mode. 如果转到左上角，通常我们处于选择模式、 If you go to the top left, normally we're under selection mode, 但就在景观下方，是我们的树叶模式。 but right underneath landscape is our foliage mode. 就像我们的景观菜单一样，这也是我们描绘资产的一种方式。 And much like our landscape menu, this is a way for us to paint assets. 因此，与其给我们的风景画上砝码 So instead of painting the weights of our landscape 或雕刻景观本身、 or sculpting the landscape itself, 我们还可以在这些不同的树叶资产上进行绘画。 we can also paint on these different foliage assets. 因此，你从 Quixel Megascans 引进的任何植被 So any vegetation that you bring in from Quixel Megascans 将自动添加到该叶片菜单中。 will automatically be added into this foliage menu. 如果我浏览其中任何一个，这里会发生什么？ And what's happening here, if I browse to any of these, 通常，我们会把静态网格放在主文件夹中、 typically we'll have our static meshes here in the main folder, 但有一个名为 "叶子 "的子文件夹、 but there's this subfolder titled foliage, 在这里，我们有不同类型的资产。 and in here we have a different type of asset. 因此，这些实际上并不是静态网格。 So these actually aren't static meshes. 开始显示的是静态网格，但如果我们放大这里、 It starts to say static mesh, but if we zoom in here, 从技术上讲，这是一个静态网格叶片演员，两者是不同的。 this technically is a static mesh foliage actor, which is different. 它们是绿色的，而不是蓝色的。 They're green instead of blue. 然后自动添加任何叶片类型的演员 And then any foliage type actor is automatically added 进入叶片工具的下拉菜单。 into this drop-down of the foliage tool. 当你的场景中出现大量这样的场景时、 And when you have a ton of these in your scene, 很难真正掌握什么是什么、 it's hard to really get a grasp of what's what, 所以我们不需要给这些荷叶上漆、 so we don't need to paint any of these lily pads, 但我想确保我清楚地知道这些草地资产是什么样的 but I want to make sure I know exactly what these grass assets look like 在我们开始粉刷之前。 before we start painting them. 因此，我要双击叶面工具资产 So I'm going to double-click on the foliage tool asset 然后双击原始静态网格 and then double-click on the original static mesh 这样我们就可以预览它，这似乎是有道理的。 so we can preview it, and that seems to make sense. 我很高兴能在这周围填充这些东西。 I'm pretty happy populating this around. 它相当大，覆盖范围很广。 It's pretty big and covers a wide area. 因此，如果你想在资产周围开始画画、 So if you want to start painting an asset around, 你只需点击这个复选标记、 you just have to click on this checkmark, and when you do that, 有一件事是隐藏的，我现在必须向下滚动、 one thing it's hidden, I have to scroll down now here, 您将获得大量新的绘画选项。 you'll get a ton of new painting options. 因此，你想知道的主要是密度、 So the main things you want to know here are the density, 所以，我们要把这块刷过的区域填满，密度要多大就有多大。 so that's how dense are we going to fill up this brushed area. 因此，这个密度是在世界空间中，所以如果我有一个大画笔、 So this density is in world space, so if I have a big brush, 你就会知道自己到底画了多少。 you'll see exactly how much you're painting. 有时，如果设置得太低，就会导致刷子变小、 Sometimes if this is set too low, when you have a small brush, 这些情况根本不会出现。 these instances just won't show up at all. 但在这里使用树叶的最大好处是 But the big advantage of using foliage here is that 实际上，我可以更新景观本身。 I can actually update the landscape itself. 所以我要从绘画模式进入雕刻模式、 So I'm going to go from paint mode into sculpt mode, 现在，如果我想雕刻这个，把这里抬高、 and now if I wanted to sculpt this and raise up this area here, 让我把这个强度提高很多、 let me just make this strength a lot higher, 让我们看看我在这里做什么。 so we can see what I'm doing here. 如果我把这个做高一点，你就能看到叶子了 If I just made this a lot taller, you can see the foliage 就会与所在表面的高度相匹配。 is going to snap to the height of whatever surface it's on. 因此，我认为我们不会做出这样的改变、 So I don't think we'll make any changes like this, 但我们仍然可以做出或大或小的改变 but we could still make big or small changes 我们的叶片会对表面做出动态反应 and our foliage will dynamically react to the surface 这对我们的绘画工作很有帮助 that we're painting it on, which is pretty helpful 比如草或树。 for things like grass or trees. 所以，让我们撤销它。让我们回到树叶模式、 So let's undo that. Let's go back into foliage mode, 当我们在这里选择这个角色时，就会导致 and when we select this actor here, that's what's going to cause 弹出这些每个演员的设置。 these per actor settings to pop up. 如果我想在这里添加不同的树叶、 If I wanted to add different foliage here, 每个演员都会有不同的设置、 we're going to get different settings per actor, 因此，我在这里调出了不同的设置 so I'm actually pulling up different settings down here 每次我选择一个新资产时 every time I select a new asset. 因此，在这种情况下，我们要选择已勾选的这一项、 So in this case, we're going to select this one that we have checked, 因为这样我们就知道它能画出来。 because then we know it's going to paint. 我们还可以在这里做一些调整，只是要让你知道。 A couple more things that we can tweak here, just so you know. 我们有 X 和 Y 刻度。 We have our scale in X and Y. 我们可以随机缩放。 We could have a random scaling. 实际上，我们可以改变这里的缩放比例。 We can actually change the scaling here. 在每种情况下，我们的缩放比例都会略有不同 In every instance, we'll have a slightly different scaling 在 X 和 Y 中。 in X and Y. 对于我们的布局，我们实际上可以将其抵消掉、 For our placement, we could actually offset this down, 所以我知道，草已经开始粘在一起了 so I could tell that the grass was starting to just stick 出地面一点。 out of the ground a little bit. 因此，如果我回到这里，设置最小 Z 偏移量 So if I go back over here, and I'll set the minimum Z offset 到负 10，最大值为负 5、 to negative 10, and we'll do the max to negative 5, 所以它总是被推倒。 so it always gets pushed down. 我们会看到他们开始融合得更多一些、 We'll see that they just start to integrate a little bit more, 开始与地面相交、 and they're starting to intersect with the ground here, 这样看起来会好一点。 so that's going to look a little bit better. 选中了 "对齐至正常值"，这对草地来说非常好、 Align to normal is checked, which this is really nice for grass, 但对于树木，您可能不希望将其与正常值对齐。 but for trees, you might not want to align this to the normal. 您可能总是希望它完全直立起来、 You might always want it to stick up perfectly straight, 无论它在什么表面上。 regardless of the surface it's on. 因此，这就是你要调整的复选框。 So that's the checkbox that you would adjust there. 然后，其中有很多只是为了更改每个实例的设置、 And then a lot of these are just to change per instance settings, 所以我们可以稍微随机旋转一下。 so we can randomize our rotation slightly. 最后，我们还可以调整是否要静态设置这些参数 And lastly, we can adjust whether each of these are going to be static 或可移动。通常，我们希望将其设置为静态。 or movable. Typically, we'll want to set these to static. 让它们可移动的理由实在不多、 There's really not much of a reason to make them movable, 如果需要，还可以为它们提供碰撞预设、 and you can give them collision presets if you needed that, 但就我们的目的而言，这已经足够了。 but that pretty much does it for our purposes. 因此，我喜欢按网格进行设置、 So I like to set up the settings per mesh, 所以，如果我有其他资产，我想把它包括进来、 so if I had another asset that I wanted to include, 我会取消选中，检查我们的新草地资产、 I would uncheck this, check our new grass asset, 并进行测试，因为设置不会转移。 and test that out, because the settings do not transfer over. 因此，在这种情况下，我只是要抓住我们的变体 16、 So in this case, I'm just going to grab our variation 16, 然后做我之前做的同样的事情，只是偏移 Z 位置。 and do the same thing I did before, just offset that Z placement. 但我对这两处的密度都很满意。 But I'm pretty happy with the density of both of these. 让我们改变一下缩放比例，这样就能有更多的变化。 And let's change our scaling, so we have a bit more variation. 如果将其设置为自由值，我们就可以更改 X、Y 和 Z 的最小值和最大值。 If we set this to free, we can change the min and max of our X, Y, and Z. 对于我们的 Z 轴，也就是垂直轴、 For our Z, which is our vertical axis, 我要把它从 0.2 改为 1、 I'm going to change this from 0.2 to 1, 所以变化很大。 so there's quite a big amount of variation. 然后将 X 和 Y 设置在 0.7 和 1 之间。 And then let's set our X and Y between 0.7 and 1. 我将把这些设置复制到另一个实例中 And I'm going to copy these settings over to our other instance 所以我要检查一下、 that we started with, so I'm going to check that on, 因此，我们将启用这两个选项，并将缩放比例设置为自由、 so we'll have both of these enabled, set our scaling to free, 然后将 X 和 Y 设置为 0.7，将 Z 比例设置为 0.2。 and then set our X and Y to 0.7, and our scale Z to 0.2. 现在，当我刷到这里时，我们就会有这两种情况。 And now when I brush out here, we'll have both of these instances. 我认为，其实每种情况都可以再大一点。 And I think actually each of these instances could be a little bit bigger. 因此，我要将缩放 X 和缩放 Y 的最大值改为 1.5、 So I'm going to change the max of our scale X and scale Y to 1.5, 并确保我们的两位红叶演员都能做到这一点。 and make sure to do that with both of our foliage actors. 这样，我们就可以开始在场景周围画画了。 And then this way, we can start to brush around our scene. 在这里添加大量树叶演员真的很容易、 It's really easy to add a ton of foliage actors here, 所以我不想说得太多，小心点就好。 so I don't want to go overboard, so just be careful. 使用这一工具时，往往是少而精。 Oftentimes, less is more when using this tool. 因此，我认为这已经为我们做好了准备。我们可以随时回去添加更多内容。 So I think this gets us set up. We can always go back and add more. 但有一件事开始让它们变得与众不同 But the one thing that's starting to make these stick out 是我们的底色。只是略有不同。 is our base color. It's just slightly different. 它比我们地面上的草更绿，饱和度更高。 It's a bit greener and more saturated than our grass on the ground. 因此，我们可以通过导航到相同的静态网格来解决这个问题、 So how we can fix that is let's just navigate to that same static mesh, 我们原来的网格，看看材料。 our original mesh, and look at the material. 因此，对于草地资产和许多叶片资产来说都是如此、 So for grass assets and a lot of foliage assets in general, 很多时候，我们会给每个对象关联两种材料、 a lot of times we'll have two materials associated to every object, 这是对树叶的 LOD 设置。 and that's for the LOD settings of our foliage. 我们可能有 8 到 10 种不同的草地资产、 We might have like 8 to 10 different variations of grass assets, 因此，无论场景中有多少树叶角色，我们都只加载这三种纹理。 so we're only loading in these three textures, regardless of how many foliage actors are in our scene. 但很多时候，我们有表面材料，也有广告牌材料。 But oftentimes, we'll have that surface material, and we'll have a billboard material. 当我们的不同 LOD 相距很远时，就会出现这种情况。 This just happens when we have different LODs that are very far away. 如果你想查看 LOD，可以在静态网格编辑器中查看、 And if you want to check out the LODs, if you're in the static mesh editor, 在左上角，你可以看到当前正在查看的 LOD。 at the top left, you can see what LOD you're currently viewing. 使用 Nanite 还是 LOD 也有不同的原因、 And there's different reasons on whether you would use Nanite or LODs to start with, 但纳米叶片是虚幻 5.1 中的新功能、 but Nanite foliage is new in Unreal 5.1, 所以在以前的虚幻版本中，您可能甚至无法在树叶上启用 Nanite。 so you may not be able to even enable Nanite on foliage in previous versions of Unreal. 现在，如果我们启用 Nanite，请记住，这将取消我们的 LOD 设置。 Now if we enabled Nanite, remember, this would get rid of our LOD settings. 但很多时候，使用 Nanite 会更好。 But a lot of times, it's a better idea to use Nanite. 在这种情况下，我们就有了最后一个 LOD。 And in that case, we would have our last LOD. 看看三角形的数量。在 LOD 2 时，我们有 5000 个三角形。 Look at the triangle count. At LOD 2, we have 5,000 triangles. 但通常情况下，我们会在很远的地方击中某个距离，比如 LOD 5、 But usually, we'll hit a certain distance far away, like LOD 5, 我们只有 16 个三角形。与原来相比，我们的数量太少了。 where we only have 16 triangles. We have so few compared to what we had originally. 在这种情况下，我们使用这种广告牌材料、 And in this case, we're using this billboard material, 这只是一张远处草地的照片。 where it's just a picture of the grass from far away. 原来如此。 So that's what's going on here. 我们只是在这个距离很远的 LOD 上更换纹理。 We're just replacing the texture on this LOD that's very far away. 但是，我们近距离看到的任何东西都会使用高质量的纹理。 But any that we see up close is going to use the high-quality textures. 但在我们的场景中使用时、 But when it comes to using this in our scene, 我们通常会先调整表面材料。 we're usually going to adjust the surface material first. 这里使用的是不同的 Quixel 材质，一种树叶材质、 This is using a different Quixel material, a foliage material here, 在这里，我们有老式的颜色叠加设置。 where we have our old-school color overlay settings. 因此，在这种情况下，我会减少绿色通道。 So in this case, I would just reduce the green channel. 因此，我只想把绿色往下拖，因为它有点太绿，饱和度太高了。 So I would just drag down in green, because it's a little bit too green and saturated. 这已经让我们更接近目标了。 And that already gets us a lot closer. 我只需回到 "未点亮 "模式即可验证这一点。 I can just verify this by going back into Unlit mode. 我们可以看到它也有点亮。 And we can see that it's a little bit bright as well. 因此，我可以将数值向下移动，直到进入更接近的范围。 So I can just move the value down until it gets into a closer range. 现在，这些树叶演员身上产生了更多的阴影。 Now there are more shadows being created on these foliage actors. 因此，有时会显得有点暗。 So sometimes this can appear a bit darker. 试验一下，找到一个好的中间点。 Just test this out and find a good middle point. 如果我打开或关闭这种颜色叠加，你就能看到不同之处。 If I toggle this color overlay on and off, you can see the difference. 这是漂亮的绿色，非常显眼。 This is pretty green and stands out. 你可以看出它没有整合。 You can kind of tell that it's not integrated. 但当我检查这个时，它的颜色又深了一些。 But when I check this on, it's a little bit darker. 颜色稍微好一点。 The color is a little bit better. 而把草藏起来的魔术，只是稍微干净了一点。 And the magic trick of hiding where that grass is, is just a little bit cleaner. 好了，这就是树叶工具。 All right, so that is the foliage tool. 我们可以这样设置。 That's how we can set that up. 不要害怕回去增加叶片的数量、 And don't be afraid to go back and increase the amount of foliage, 特别是在我们的人行道周围。 especially around our walkways. 这也是这个工具的优点之一。 That's one of the nicer things about this tool. 能大体上挡住它就不错了。 It's nice to block it in broadly. 但当你开始在序列中创建镜头时、 But as you start to create shots within your sequence, 您可以随时返回，绘制更多细节 you can always go back in and paint additional detail 当你走近场景的不同部分时。 as you get closer to different parts of your scene. 现在你可以看到背景了、 And now you can see in the background, 我们的地面会更加立体。 we get a lot more three-dimensionality out of our ground. 背景中出现了一片漂亮的草地。 And we get this nice grass coming out of the background. 即使是前景，我们也能获得更多细节。 And even in our foreground, we just get a little bit more detail. 这就是叶片工具的全部内容。 So that's all there is on the foliage tool. 可以随意添加更多不同类型的树叶、 Feel free to add in more foliage, different types, 并在不同场景中使用。 and use that on different scenes as well. 这是一套非常强大的工具。 It's a really powerful tool set. 但这就是我们在本课程中要讨论的全部内容。 But that's all we'll talk about for now inside of this course. 为了更新我们的进度，我现在要渲染一张新的剧照。 And just to update our progress, I'm just going to render out a new still. 好了，现在我们来对比一下我们的图像、 All right, so now if we compare our image, 我们可以看到，我们已经非常接近了。 we can see that we are getting pretty close here. 显然，我们最后缺少的重要东西就是我们的树木。 Obviously, the last big thing that we're missing are our trees. 所以，让我们把这些东西搬到现场吧。 So let's get those into the scene. 所以，你可以用树叶演员来设置这个场景 So you could set this up with foliage actors 并把它们涂来涂去。 and paint them around. 但要移动单个实例可能有点麻烦。 But it can be a little tricky to move individual instances around. 使用 "选择 "工具就可以做到这一点。 There is a way to do that by using the Select tool. 但正如你所看到的，这可能非常棘手。 But as you can see, this can be pretty finicky. 我发现，这些方法的作用越来越小 And I have found that these have worked less and less 在较新版本的虚幻软件中。 in more recent versions of Unreal. 在虚幻 4 中效果很好，但在虚幻 5 中效果不佳。 Worked really well in Unreal 4, but not so well in 5. 因此，通常情况下，如果我需要移动一些草、 So usually if I have to move some grass around, 实际上，我最终会删除某些部分 I'd actually just end up deleting certain sections 使用擦除工具，重新绘制周围的树叶。 with the Erase tool and repainting the foliage around. 或者，如果您想具体确定要在哪里放置 Or if you want to be specific about where you want to place 在单一实例中，它们具有这种单一模式 a single instance, they have this single mode 在这里，你可以说，嘿，我想要这些草地资产。 where you can say, hey, right here I want these grass assets. 在这种情况下，它会同时放置草地资产 In this case, it'll place both grass assets 在同一个地方。 in the same exact spot. 所以一定要注意这一点。 So just be aware of that. 但是，我们要以传统的方式放置它们 But we're going to place them the old-fashioned way 只需在大纲器中移动它们即可、 by just moving them around in our outliner, 就像我们对待石头一样。 much like we did with our rocks. 那就按 3 键吧。 So let's press the 3 key. 然后我们回到资产视图的树形部分。 And then we'll go back to the tree portion of our asset view. 我只选三棵最大的树。 And I'm just going to take the three biggest trees here. 我先用 Alt 键单击，然后用 Shift 键拖动这些 And I'm going to Alt-click and then Shift to drag these 进入我们的场景。 into our scene. 因此，至少我们有了最大的开始 So at least we have the biggest ones to start 阻挡我们的场景。 blocking our scene with. 我们将回到点亮模式。 We'll go back into lit mode. 现在你可以看到，这对我们来说非常容易 And now you can see it'll be pretty easy for us 与我们的参照物的构成相一致 to line up and match the composition of our reference 屏幕右边有一棵大树、 So we have a big tree here on screen right, 类似的东西。 something like that. 我们把这个移到这里，然后旋转到位。 We'll move this one over here and just rotate that into place. 尤其是树木，它真的很容易 And especially with trees, it's really easy 只需在 Z 轴上旋转，就能增加随机性。 to add randomization just by rotating them in Z. 它们看起来就像全新的树木资产。 And they'll start to look like brand new tree assets. 所以，通常只要两三个就够了、 So usually if you can get away with just two or three, 少用资产总是好的。 it's always better to use less assets. 它只会帮助你的现场 It's just going to help your scene 在这种情况下，我们可以重复使用相同的资产。 where we can instance the same assets over and over again. 因此，只要我们得到的形状类似于 So as long as we're getting a similar shape to what 这就是胜利。 we're getting in our reference, we'll call that a win. 然后还可以在一个方向上进行缩放 And then you can also scale these in one direction 只要你不把它逼得太紧。 as long as you don't push it too far. 这也有助于增加一些变化。 That'll also help add in a little bit more variation. 就像这个，我可以移到这里。 So like this one, I can move over here. 我们会把它做得更小更宽一点。 We'll make it a little bit smaller and wider. 我们甚至可以把树根埋起来，让它看起来就像灌木丛一样 And we can even bury the roots so it almost looks like a bush 然后把它浸入地下一点。 and just submerge that into the ground a little bit. 只需点击几下，我们就已经开始了 And with just a few clicks, we've already started 以阻止一些很有希望的事情发生。 to block in something pretty promising. 从这里，我会跳出我们的摄像机视角 From here, I would just jump out of our camera view 然后确保我们可以围绕 and then make sure we can populate these around 所以它们均匀地分布在我们的场景中。 so they're evenly spread around our scene. 所以我们可以把摄像机对准任何地方 So we can just kind of point the camera anywhere 不要想太多。 and not think too much about it. 我们会有一些已经开始在我们的场景中发挥作用的东西。 We'll have something that already starts to work in our scene. 通常，最好的办法是 And typically, the best way to do that 就是抓住我们的资产，然后点击 Control-M。 is to grab
